---
title: "Themes"
engine: knitr
---

## Themes

**Spada** has 2 themes:

-   Spada

-   Dark Spada

### Choosing the Theme

Menu Options \> Config

![](images/articles/themes/themes_menu.png)

Open **Theme**

![](images/articles/themes/themes_config.png)

Choose the desired Theme and **Apply**. The app will be updated to the choosed theme.

![](images/articles/themes/themes_dark_spada.png)
